title: Mutation of the Apocalypse
description:
On the eve of his sixteenth birthday, a destitute orphan sat alone with a strawberry grape cake and called it a celebration.

Then every human on Earth heard the same voice at the same time.

"HUMANS OF EARTH! INITIATING EARTH MUTATION PROGRAM!"

Cars left the roads. Streets turned red. The world mutated. The fish, the dogs, the neighbors.

Lucas woke up the morning after his birthday to a holographic system informing him his agility was below the adult human average.

He had been an orphan fisherman since he was ten. He had survived on less.

"Never thought I'd say this, but I miss the sound of traffic jams."

[Note: First novel. The author welcomes feedback and cannot promise he won't cry. Chapters daily.]
